title: tragacantha lithophila
intro: Tragacantha lithophila, also known as rock spurge or lithospermum, is a type of succulent plant that grows in rocky areas. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha lithophila include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha lithophila typically involve drying the plant's leaves or roots, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
